sourceOverview.notes: TTS with studio UI. 20+ languages. Content creator focused.

audit.priceRangeSummary: Falcon is marketed at about $0.01/minute and also shown as ~$0.01 per 1,000 characters on pricing materials. Other studio/API plans vary.
audit.limitsSummary: Docs/marketing cite ~5 concurrent sessions and ~1,000 RPM on free, ~15 concurrent and ~10,000 RPM on paid. Marketing also claims 10,000 concurrent calls globally for Falcon.
audit.regionSummary: Edge deployment across 10+ regions is marketed for Falcon.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: Around 35 languages / 10+ accents in current marketing; exact counts vary across pages.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: e.g., 100,000 characters on free API access offers.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Good cost-focused conversational TTS candidate. Note that Murf’s published counts (voices/languages) differ slightly across pages.

supplementalResearch.title: 51. Murf.ai (US) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 51. Murf.ai (US) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. **Murf Falcon** engine: 55ms latency, $0.01/min, 150+ voices.

API: $0.03/1K chars PAYG. Free trial: 100K chars API. Studio: 30+ languages. Dubbing: 44 languages. On-premise Falcon deployment. SOC 2. 50M free chars for startup incubator program.
